title: Aviar
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Aviars''' were winged creatures native to [[Drall (planet)|Drall]]. There were many species, identifiable by color and plumage patterns, such as the ''white-winged aviar''. They roosted in trees and artificial structures. Social animals by nature, they flew and migrated in coveys. The Duchess [[Marcha]]'s [[Marcha's Estate|garden dome]] contained many different species of aviar as well as some imported [[Corellia/Legends|Corellian]] birds.

There also existed a family of colorful and variegated avians called [[ibbot]]s, which were, like the aviar family, native to Drall, but aviars and ibbots were distinct from one another.

{{Creature-stub}}
